title: insight emergent properties
summary: The thread focuses on insight-emergent-properties, a new insight-layer thread that addresses emergent properties in codebases. It highlights a strong asymmetry between description and functionality, as well as a uniform structural asymmetry in stated plans. Key decisions include declaring a tier-4 register and implementing a tier-5 permission with recurrence-citation requirements. The outcome is a structured approach to understanding and managing emergent properties in software development.
